---
title: ""
toc: false
page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<style>
  .resume-hero {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0c2d6b 0%, #1a56db 50%, #3b82f6 100%);
    color: #fff;
    padding: 3rem 2rem;
    text-align: center;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .resume-hero::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: -50%; left: -50%;
    width: 200%; height: 200%;
    background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(255,255,255,0.05) 1px, transparent 1px);
    background-size: 30px 30px;
    animation: drift 20s linear infinite;
  }

  @keyframes drift {
    from { transform: translate(0, 0); }
    to { transform: translate(30px, 30px); }
  }

  @keyframes fadeInUp {
    from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(25px); }
    to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
  }

  @keyframes gradientShift {
    0% { background-position: 0% 50%; }
    50% { background-position: 100% 50%; }
    100% { background-position: 0% 50%; }
  }

  .resume-hero-content { position: relative; z-index: 1; }

  .resume-hero h1 {
    font-size: 2.5rem; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 0.3rem;
    color: #fff; border: none; animation: fadeInUp 0.8s ease-out;
  }

  .resume-hero .tagline {
    color: #bfdbfe; font-size: 1.1rem; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
    animation: fadeInUp 0.8s ease-out 0.2s both;
  }

  .resume-hero .contact-links {
    margin-top: 1rem; animation: fadeInUp 0.8s ease-out 0.4s both;
  }

  .resume-hero .contact-links a {
    color: #fff; border: 2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.4);
    padding: 0.4rem 1rem; border-radius: 8px; margin: 0.2rem 0.3rem;
    font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 600; text-decoration: none;
    display: inline-block; transition: all 0.3s ease;
  }

  .resume-hero .contact-links a:hover {
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.15); border-color: #fff; transform: translateY(-2px);
  }

  .download-btn {
    display: inline-block;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.2), rgba(255,255,255,0.1));
    border: 2px solid #fff;
    color: #fff !important; padding: 0.6rem 1.6rem; border-radius: 10px;
    font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 600; text-decoration: none !important;
    margin-top: 1.2rem; transition: all 0.3s ease;
    animation: fadeInUp 0.8s ease-out 0.6s both;
  }

  .download-btn:hover {
    background: #fff; color: #1a56db !important;
    transform: translateY(-3px); box-shadow: 0 8px 25px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
  }

  /* Resume Body */
  .resume-body { max-width: 850px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 2rem; }

  .resume-section {
    background: #fff; border-radius: 14px; padding: 2rem; margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(26, 86, 219, 0.08); border-left: 4px solid #dbeafe;
    transition: all 0.4s ease; animation: fadeInUp 0.7s ease-out both;
  }

  .resume-section:nth-child(1) { animation-delay: 0.1s; }
  .resume-section:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: 0.2s; }
  .resume-section:nth-child(3) { animation-delay: 0.3s; }
  .resume-section:nth-child(4) { animation-delay: 0.4s; }
  .resume-section:nth-child(5) { animation-delay: 0.5s; }

  .resume-section:hover {
    border-left: 4px solid #1a56db;
    box-shadow: 0 8px 25px rgba(26, 86, 219, 0.12);
    transform: translateY(-3px);
  }

  .resume-section h2 {
    color: #1a56db; font-weight: 700; font-size: 1.4rem;
    margin-top: 0; margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
    padding-bottom: 0.5rem; border-bottom: 2px solid #dbeafe;
  }

  .resume-entry {
    padding: 1rem 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9; transition: all 0.3s ease;
  }

  .resume-entry:last-child { border-bottom: none; }

  .resume-entry:hover {
    background-color: #f8faff; border-radius: 8px; padding-left: 0.8rem;
  }

  .resume-entry h3 { color: #1e40af; font-size: 1.1rem; margin: 0 0 0.2rem 0; }

  .resume-date { color: #64748b; font-size: 0.85rem; font-style: italic; }

  .resume-entry p {
    color: #475569; font-size: 0.92rem; line-height: 1.6; margin-top: 0.5rem;
  }

  /* Highlights */
  .highlight-grid { display: flex; gap: 1rem; flex-wrap: wrap; margin-top: 0.8rem; }

  .highlight-item {
    background: #eff6ff; border-radius: 10px; padding: 0.8rem 1rem;
    flex: 1; min-width: 150px; text-align: center; transition: all 0.3s ease;
  }

  .highlight-item:hover {
    background: #1a56db; color: #fff; transform: translateY(-3px);
  }

  .highlight-item:hover .highlight-number,
  .highlight-item:hover .highlight-label { color: #fff; }

  .highlight-number {
    font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 700; color: #1a56db;
    display: block; transition: color 0.3s ease;
  }

  .highlight-label { font-size: 0.8rem; color: #64748b; transition: color 0.3s ease; }

  /* Tags */
  .tag {
    display: inline-block; background-color: #dbeafe; color: #1e40af;
    padding: 0.25rem 0.75rem; border-radius: 20px; font-size: 0.8rem;
    margin-right: 0.4rem; margin-bottom: 0.4rem; font-weight: 500;
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
  }

  .tag:hover { background-color: #1a56db; color: #fff; transform: translateY(-2px) scale(1.05); }

  /* Summary callout */
  .summary-box {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #eff6ff, #dbeafe);
    border-radius: 12px; padding: 1.2rem 1.5rem;
    border-left: 4px solid #1a56db; font-size: 0.95rem;
    color: #1e40af; line-height: 1.6; margin-bottom: 1rem;
  }
</style>

<!-- Resume Hero -->
<div class="resume-hero">
  <div class="resume-hero-content">
    <h1>Shivang Bhatt</h1>
    <p class="tagline">GTM & Revenue Analytics · Growth Engineering · Marketing Data Science</p>
    <div class="contact-links">
      <a href="tel:6199538933">📱 (619) 953-8933</a>
      <a href="mailto:s1bhatt@ucsd.edu">✉ s1bhatt@ucsd.edu</a>
      <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/shivang-bhatt-data" target="_blank">in LinkedIn</a>
    </div>
    <a href="resume.pdf" class="download-btn" download>📄 Download Resume PDF</a>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Resume Body -->
<div class="resume-body">

  <!-- Summary -->
  <div class="resume-section">
    <h2>👤 Summary</h2>
    <div class="summary-box">
      GTM-focused analytics professional with 4+ years turning pipeline data, marketing signals, and customer behavior into revenue growth. Experienced in building forecasting models, attribution frameworks, and self-serve dashboards that empower marketing, sales, and product teams to move faster. Pursuing an M.S. in Business Analytics at UC San Diego (Rady).
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Key Highlights -->
  <div class="resume-section">
    <h2>⚡ Key Highlights</h2>
    <div class="highlight-grid">
      <div class="highlight-item">
        <span class="highlight-number">20%</span>
        <span class="highlight-label">Campaign ROI Lift</span>
      </div>
      <div class="highlight-item">
        <span class="highlight-number">$380K</span>
        <span class="highlight-label">Profit from ML Campaign</span>
      </div>
      <div class="highlight-item">
        <span class="highlight-number">70%</span>
        <span class="highlight-label">Latency Reduction</span>
      </div>
      <div class="highlight-item">
        <span class="highlight-number">94%</span>
        <span class="highlight-label">Model Accuracy</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Education -->
  <div class="resume-section">
    <h2>🎓 Education</h2>
    <div class="resume-entry">
      <h3>University of California, San Diego</h3>
      <span class="resume-date">M.S. in Business Analytics (Rady Scholar) · Dec 2026</span>
      <p>Customer Analytics, Big Data Analytics, Digital Transformation, Targeting & Uplift Modeling, Churn Prediction, A/B Testing & Experiment Design</p>
    </div>
    <div class="resume-entry">
      <h3>Wilson College, University of Mumbai</h3>
      <span class="resume-date">B.S. in Management Studies (Business Statistics) · Oct 2020</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Experience -->
  <div class="resume-section">
    <h2>💼 Experience</h2>

    <div class="resume-entry">
      <h3>Senior Business Intelligence Analyst (GTM & Revenue) — NuSummit Technologies</h3>
      <span class="resume-date">Apr 2023 – Apr 2025 · Remote</span>
      <p>Led GTM & revenue dashboard automation for enterprise clients in financial services and insurance. Built SQL/Snowflake pipeline forecasting models from Salesforce data to track lead-to-close efficiency. Partnered with marketing and sales to define GTM KPIs, boosting campaign ROI by 20% and conversion rates by 12%. Developed ETL pipelines and Python scripts in AWS for near real-time executive reporting. Created customer segmentation models achieving 94% accuracy across 5,000+ reviews to guide product launches.</p>
    </div>

    <div class="resume-entry">
      <h3>Business Intelligence Analyst (GTM Reporting) — Boston Institute of Analytics</h3>
      <span class="resume-date">Jun 2021 – Jan 2023 · Remote</span>
      <p>Built dashboards tracking pipeline health, marketing impact, and customer success. Developed a Multi-Touch Attribution framework to determine ROAS and optimize channel spend. Conducted funnel analysis and A/B testing in HubSpot and Salesforce. Optimized SQL queries reducing dashboard latency by 70%. Supported Qlik-to-Tableau migration through standardized metrics and self-serve analytics.</p>
    </div>

    <div class="resume-entry">
      <h3>Data Strategy Intern (Sales Analytics) — Kustard.ai</h3>
      <span class="resume-date">Apr – Jul 2019 · Remote</span>
      <p>Designed pipeline and lead efficiency dashboards. Built predictive engagement models improving targeting accuracy to 94%. Automated sales reporting cutting turnaround time by 30%. Supported GTM planning to boost consumer engagement by 7%.</p>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Skills -->
  <div class="resume-section">
    <h2>🛠 Skills</h2>

    <p><strong>GTM & Marketing Analytics:</strong>
    <span class="tag">Multi-Touch Attribution</span><span class="tag">ROAS</span><span class="tag">Campaign Optimization</span><span class="tag">Uplift Modeling</span><span class="tag">A/B Testing</span><span class="tag">Funnel Analysis</span></p>

    <p><strong>CRM & Marketing Platforms:</strong>
    <span class="tag">Salesforce</span><span class="tag">HubSpot</span><span class="tag">GA4</span><span class="tag">Segment</span></p>

    <p><strong>BI & Visualization:</strong>
    <span class="tag">Tableau</span><span class="tag">Power BI</span><span class="tag">Excel</span><span class="tag">Alteryx</span><span class="tag">Dashboard Automation</span></p>

    <p><strong>Data & ML:</strong>
    <span class="tag">SQL</span><span class="tag">Python</span><span class="tag">Snowflake</span><span class="tag">AWS</span><span class="tag">XGBoost</span><span class="tag">Causal Inference</span><span class="tag">Churn Prediction</span><span class="tag">Customer LTV</span></p>
  </div>

</div>
```
